name: Fidelity Rewards Visa Signature Card

welcome_offer.description: No welcome bonus. Rewards start earning immediately at 2%.

earning_rates.notes: Unlimited 2% cash back (2 points per $1) on all net purchases when deposited into an eligible Fidelity account. 1.5% flat rate if redeemed as statement credit or to non-Fidelity account.

other_benefits.name: TSA PreCheck/Global Entry credit
other_benefits.description: $100 statement credit for TSA PreCheck or Global Entry fee

other_benefits.name: Visa Signature Benefits
other_benefits.description: Travel and Emergency Assistance, Lost Wallet Service, Luxury Hotel Collection, etc.

notes: Effective April 22, 2025, some changes to the rewards program were announced — cardholders should refer to their November statement or new account materials. The card requires a Fidelity account to redeem rewards at best rate (2%). Redemption to non-Fidelity accounts caps at 1.5%. No annual fee and no foreign transaction fees.
